Id1.text: The Seat Ibiza and the Audi A1, built by Audi, are both cars.

Id2.text: The Seat Ibiza and the Audi manufactured Audi A1 are both cars and therefore a related means of transportation.

Id3.text: The Audi A1, which is manufactured by Audi, and the Seat Ibiza are similar means of transport.
